use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and key user actions
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Secondary and tertiary navigation buttons for multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
Ghost buttons for subtle UI actions without visual weight
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with semantic variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for asChild composition, CVA for variant management, and includes accessibility features like focus-visible outlines and keyboard navigation. Features subtle shadows and smooth hover transitions for a polished, production-ready button system.
